architecture_engineering.overview: Architecture & Engineering focuses on designing, building, and improving the physical world. In Sri Lanka, it remains a prestigious and technically demanding field.
roles: Architect: Design buildings with attention to aesthetics, space, and functionality.
Civil Engineer: Design and manage structures, infrastructure, drainage, and construction systems.
Biomedical Engineer: Work with medical technologies, devices, and hospital equipment.
education: 5-year academic route leading to Chartered Architect status (Architecture).
4-year engineering degree leading to Chartered Engineer status (Engineering).
Bridge courses in AutoCAD, Revit, Basic Surveying, and Graphic Design.
architecture_engineering.trends: Continuous technical demand and prestige; requires strong technical preparation and often an aptitude test or strong Z-score for state routes.

arts_design.overview: Arts, Design & Entertainment is highly fast-growing powered by digital media, branding, marketing, and content creation.
roles: Graphic Designer / Visual Communicator: Create visual content for brands, campaigns, interfaces.
Fashion Designer: Design clothing, understand materials, and contribute to the apparel industry.
Animator & VFX Artist: Produce motion graphics, 2D/3D animation, and visual effects.
education: State university degree with high Z-score and aptitude test.
Private school design programs (require A/L passes and portfolio).
Short courses in Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator, Blender.
arts_design.trends: Strong growth driven by digital media; highly values a strong portfolio (like Behance) over traditional academics.
institutions: University of the Visual & Performing Arts

business_management.overview: A versatile field supporting every major industry. Highly popular in Sri Lanka due to combining degrees with professional qualifications like CIMA.
roles: Human Resources Manager: Handle recruitment, training, employee relations.
Accountant / Financial Controller: Manage financial records, taxation, reporting.
Business Development Manager: Drive company growth through partnerships and new customers.
education: State University degrees (Commerce stream, requires Z-score).
External Degrees (require 3 C passes in relevant subjects).
Professional qualifications: CIMA, ACCA, CA Sri Lanka, CIPM, CIM.
business_management.trends: Steady demand across all sectors; success heavily depends on combining foundational academics with professional networking and English skills.

education.overview: Education is a respected, stable profession in Sri Lanka, opening pathways into government schools, private institutions, and higher education.
roles: School Teacher: Teach, mentor, and guide students in classrooms.
School Principal / Administrator: Lead schools, manage operations, staff, budgets, policies.
Lecturer / Professor: Teach in universities and contribute to academic research.
education: National Colleges of Education (NCoE) for 3-year National Diploma in Teaching.
State university B.Ed. degrees (e.g., Colombo, Open University).
Private institute trainee teacher and diploma pathways, plus UK TKT certification.
education.trends: Consistent government demand (announced via Gazette); English-medium and international school pathways highly value practical exposure and language proficiency.

future_tech.overview: Future Tech includes AI, Cloud, and Blockchain. It is a globally connected sector offering strong remote work and excellent foreign-income opportunities.
roles: AI & Machine Learning Engineer: Build intelligent systems and prediction models.
Cloud Architect: Design secure, scalable cloud systems using AWS and Azure.
Blockchain Developer: Build decentralized systems and smart contracts.
education: State AI routes (Mathematical stream, high Z-score).
Private routes and pathways (SLIIT, IIT) with bridging support.
Professional certs: AWS Cloud, IIT Cert in AI, Web3 platforms.
future_tech.trends: Massive global demand curve; emphasis on continuous learning, Python programming, Mathematics, and decentralized systems.

healthcare_medicine.overview: A highly respected and stable career sector providing strong public-sector demand alongside growing private-sector and overseas opportunities.
roles: Surgeon / Doctor (MBBS): Diagnose illnesses, treat patients, perform surgery.
Nurse / Nurse Practitioner: Provide patient care, administer treatment, monitor recovery.
Physiotherapist: Help patients recover movement and function.
education: 5-year MBBS + 1-year internship (State Medical Faculties).
Government Nursing Schools (NTS) requiring 3 S passes in A/Ls.
Private Healthcare Diplomas (IIHS, Amrak, Asiri) requiring careful SLMC/SLNC verification.
healthcare_medicine.trends: High demand abroad for nursing and caregiving. Increasing availability of structured private health science diplomas in Sri Lanka.
institutions: Ministry of Health Nurses Training Schools (NTS)
Amrak / Asiri Academy / Lanka Hospitals Academy

hospitality_tourism.overview: A dynamic, fast-growing industry offering global careers in hotels, travel, events, and food service for students who enjoy communication and dynamic environments.
roles: Hotel & Resort Management: Manage guest experience, front office, food & beverage.
Culinary Arts: Work as professional chefs in kitchens and luxury hospitality settings.
Travel & Event Management: Plan tours, events, conferences, and destination experiences.
education: SLITHM National Diploma (requires 3 S passes, O/L English).
Degree routes accepting 3 S passes in any stream.
Craft level courses starting from directly after O/Ls.
hospitality_tourism.trends: Vibrant post-pandemic recovery in Sri Lanka; highly reliant on spoken English, customer service etiquette, and practical training.

knowledge_based.overview: Professions built on formal qualifications, legal recognition, and professional licensing (Medicine, Law, Chartered Finance).
roles: Doctor (MBBS): Medical practitioner requiring SLMC registration.
Lawyer (LLB / Attorney-at-Law): Legal professional requiring professional qualification to practise.
Chartered Accountant / Finance: Financial expert requiring body membership (CA, CIMA).
education: State University degrees (LLB, MBBS).
Sri Lanka Law College entrance route.
Professional qualifications starting directly after 3 S passes.
knowledge_based.trends: Highly stable, prestigious, long-term careers. They require the longest training periods and strict adherence to professional boards.

science_research.overview: Ideal for curious, analytical students interested in discovery. Supports critical industries such as healthcare, agriculture, and environmental management.
roles: Microbiologist: Study microorganisms for healthcare and agriculture.
Physicist: Work in research, medical physics, and telecommunications.
Environmental Scientist: Create solutions for sustainability and conservation.
education: State internal BSc routes (require 3 S passes in Science stream).
External BSc programs (Colombo/UCSC).
Laboratory Technology Diplomas & Foundation programs.
science_research.trends: Growing focus on green tech and sustainability. Benefits greatly from programming skills like Python and R.

skill_based.overview: The fastest route to employment and financial independence in Sri Lanka. Supported by the professional, globally recognized NVQ system.
roles: Electrician: Install and repair electrical systems in homes, businesses, factories.
HVAC / Refrigeration Technician: Install and maintain cooling and air-conditioning systems.
Solar Technician: Specialize in solar power systems installations.
education: NVQ Levels 3 to 4 (Basic to Full Craftsman).
NVQ Levels 5 to 6 (Technician / Supervisor level).
NVQ Level 7 (Bachelor-level pathway).
skill_based.trends: Very high local and foreign demand for properly certified (NVQ) technical craftsmen; excellent opportunities for entrepreneurship.

tech_computing.overview: One of the most stable and high-paying fields, offering remote work and foreign company roles as Sri Lanka moves into a digital economy.
roles: Software Developer: Build applications, websites, mobile apps, and systems.
Cybersecurity Analyst: Protect systems, networks, and data from cyber threats.
Data Scientist: Analyze data to find patterns and support decision-making.
education: State university internal degrees (Maths/ICT background).
UCSC BIT external degree (3 S passes in any stream).
SLIIT BSc IT (Arts/Commerce students can enter via bridging programs).
tech_computing.trends: Exceptional job demand, extremely strong salary growth, and globally transferable skills across all technology sub-domains.
